title: Social Media Services
intro: Photography-led social media content and management for businesses, teams and brands. Because Shaney is a photographer first, the content itself looks considered and on-brand — supported by thoughtful content planning and storytelling that feels human rather than generic. Available for clients in South Africa, the USA and internationally, as ongoing management, once-off content creation, or management without photography where requested.
whoFor: Brands that need consistent content but do not want a large agency

services.name: Social Media Management
services.whoFor: For small businesses, personal brands, sports teams, lifestyle brands, creatives and service-based businesses that need consistent, beautiful and story-led social media content.
services.expect: Because Shaney understands photography, styling and visual storytelling, her social media support is not only about posting consistently. It is about creating content that looks considered, feels on-brand and gives people a reason to stop scrolling.
services.packageDetails: From $350 per month — two posts per week across all your platforms, planned, written and visually styled to feel like your brand.

services.name: Social Media Content Creation
services.whoFor: For clients who need beautiful content but may manage their own posting.
services.expect: Brand photos, lifestyle content, behind-the-scenes moments, short-form video planning, Reels content, social media image banks, event content and influencer-style documentation.
services.packageDetails: Quoted per project — shaped around your shoot days, content needs and usage.

packages.name: Essentials — from $350/month
packages.details: Consistent, story-led support: two posts per week across all your platforms — planned, written and visually styled to feel like your brand. Content calendar and captions included.

packages.name: Tailored plans
packages.details: Need more? Content creation days, Reels, community management and campaign support are added to a plan shaped around your business. Every brand receives a personal proposal — because a sports team, a boutique and a growing service business each need something different.

packages.name: Seasonal offers
packages.details: From time to time Shaney runs seasonal offers — announced first on her social channels. Worth a follow.

internationalCopy: Shaney works from South Africa, but her creative approach is not limited by location. For international clients paying in dollars, euros or pounds, working with a South African creative can offer a strong value advantage while still receiving professional, personal and visually considered social media support. This is ideal for businesses and teams that want consistent storytelling, warm creative direction and reliable content support without the scale or cost of a large agency.
